stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, Continental Bank Note Co. (with Secret Mark)
stamp.summary: 1-cent blue Benjamin Franklin from the Bank Note series. This impression shows the Continental Bank Note Company secret mark: a small crescent-shaped dash in the pearl ornament at the left of the numeral '1' scroll in the lower-left corner. Printed on hard paper, perforated 12.

stamp.title: US 1c Franklin, National Bank Note Co. (without Secret Mark)
stamp.summary: 1-cent blue Benjamin Franklin, National Bank Note Company printing. Lacks the secret mark in the lower-left pearl ornament, which remains clear white. This identifies it as the earlier 1870 issue (non-grilled). Printed on hard paper, perforated 12.
